arts.ttl: Romano announces 'HERE WE GO' on Marcus Rashford transfer
arts.sum: FootballTransfers understands that Barcelona were extremely interested in finalising a move for the 27-year-old, but he is now on the verge of joining Aston Villa on a six-month loan deal. The England forward has been linked with an Old Trafford exit for the entirety of the January transfer window and Villa look set to complete a loan deal amid serious competition from Barcelona and AC Milan.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Crystal Palace LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups from Old Trafford
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim’s team would drop further down the table if they lose to the Eagles today

arts.ttl: Why Manchester United signing Patrick Dorgu was Amorim priority buy
arts.sum: Manchester United have completed the signing of Patrick Dorgu from Leece. It's the first major incoming from the English giants in January with United paying the Serie A club an initial fee of...

arts.ttl: 'Glitch in the matrix' - can Dorgu solve Man Utd's problem?
arts.sum: Manchester United hope Patrick Dorgu will be the wing-back Ruben Amorim has been desperate for.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford signing makes a mockery of Aston Villa's grand plans - he brings more baggage than a London to Sydney flight and here's what they should be doing instead to get to the top, writes TOM COLLOMOSSE
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: As Rashford and Asensio prepare to join on loan on Sunday for combined salaries at the thick end of £500,000 a week, it feels a little like Villa are making it up as they go along.

arts.ttl: Man Utd sign Denmark defender Patrick Dorgu from Lecce for initial £25million
arts.sum: The 20-year-old wing-back has signed a deal until June 2030.

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Manchester United Sign Patrick Dorgu from Lecce
arts.sum: Manchester United have officially announced the signing of Patrick Dorgu from Lecce, marking a significant addition to their defensive lineup. The 20-year-old Danish international has committed to a long-term contract with the Red Devils, extending until June 2030 with an option for an additional year. The post OFFICIAL: Manchester United Sign Patrick Dorgu from Lecce appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Patrick Dorgu: Man Utd 'perfect place' as £29.2m signing confirmed
arts.sum: Manchester United complete the signing of Patrick Dorgu from Lecce on a five-year contract.
